form.formComment: In the money last time at this track (22.89) in a Grade 4, finishing a 6 length third. Strong record off the draw with two wins and three minors from five starts. Makes strong appeal.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a fast early sectional but found one better when runner up over 400m at this track clocking 22.71. Broke a two-start winning streak with the placing last time. Can bounce back.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 5 lengths in 22.54, beating Time Has Come. Last start finished 5th on April 10 over 400m at this track behind Aussie Gem beaten 3.5 lengths (22.84) in a Free For All. Unbeaten in two starts from this draw. Winning chance.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a strong early split and led throughout to score an impressive win by 1.75 lengths over 400m at this track (22.59). The last win was in one of the quickest times on the card. Stick with her.
